3186990.name: Carrot Catcher
3186990.description:
Carrot Catcher is a colourful 2D platformer that challenges your precision, reflexes, and speed. Dash, jump, and bounce your way through a variety of handcrafted levels filled with moving platforms, spike traps, and secret areas. Each level is designed to test your skills while rewarding quick thinking and exploration.

Your goal is simple: collect as many carrots as possible and reach the finish line in the fastest time you can. Compete against your own best runs and aim for perfect scores by mastering every jump and uncovering every hidden path.

Features include:

  • Tight, responsive platforming with dash and jump mechanics

  • Multiple levels, each with unique layouts and hazards

  • Carrot collection and time-based scoring for added replayability

  • Unlockable cosmetic items like skins and hats, hidden throughout levels or earned via top performance

  • A mysterious brain-in-a-vat character that guides you through the game’s light narrative

  • Bright, vibrant art style and a smooth soundtrack

Whether you're chasing high scores or searching for every secret, Carrot Catcher offers a fun, fast-paced platforming experience for players of all skill levels.
3186990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
